Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The 'Stakeholder-oriented policy evaluation' topic supports participatory decision-making (Target 16.7). Critiquing educational administration aligns with building effective institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course topic 'internationalization of primary/secondary schools' implies international cooperation and knowledge sharing, aligning with partnership principles (Targets 17.6, 17.9).
